---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: ../cv_style_webpage_2column.css
    theme: default
    format-links: false
    grid:
      body-width: 920px
---

```{r}
#| label: required-packages
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(googlesheets4)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| echo: false
#| include: false

# Full project list, a supplement to the CV's Project Experience section.
# Pulled live from the Projects tab of the CV Google Sheet, using the
# Project_Short_Name, Project_Location, and Project_Description_Short fields.
cv_data <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12-v_2G9hekg9jv-Om4kFGLmT733Bnb6p_NSW0jl6nYY/edit?gid=1958414084#gid=1958414084"
projects <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Projects")
```

```{r}
#| label: projects
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat("::: {.publications}\n\n")
cat("::: {.pubs-header}\n\n")
cat("## Projects\n\n")
cat("[← Back to CV](CV.html){.all-pubs-link}\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")

walk(1:nrow(projects), \(i) {
  p <- projects |> slice(i)
  if (is.na(p$Project_Short_Name)) return(invisible())

  entry <- paste0("**", p$Project_Short_Name, "**")
  if (!is.na(p$Project_Location)) entry <- paste0(entry, " (", p$Project_Location, ")")
  if (!is.na(p$Project_Description_Short)) entry <- paste0(entry, " — ", p$Project_Description_Short)

  cat(entry, "\n\n")
})

cat(":::\n\n")
```
